title: Personal Knowledge Wiki Skill for Claude Code
author: farzaa
description: A Claude Code skill implementing Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern with 7 commands: ingest, absorb, query, cleanup, breakdown, rebuild-index, reorganize. Includes directory taxonomy, writing standards, anti-cramming/anti-thinning rules, and parallel subagent workflows.

compliance.reason: Wildcard robots.txt restricts gist paths; no explicit Anthropic/Claude blocks. User-initiated.
